title: AoE3 Mod Manifest
description: Schema validated by the catalog repo CI on every PR. The launcher reads manifests that pass this schema; anything else is rejected.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL — purely for editor IntelliSense, ignored by the launcher.

id.description: Unique mod id. Lowercase alphanumerics + hyphens only. Must match the folder name under /mods/.

accentColor.description: Hex color used for borders, badges, and the synthetic banner gradient when no banner.png is supplied.

icon.description: Filename of icon.png in the same folder. Specs: 256x256, PNG with alpha, <= 100 KB.

banner.description: Filename of banner.png/banner.jpg in the same folder. Specs: 1200x300, <= 500 KB.

description.description: Per-language short description shown in the mod selector. Keys: ISO-639-1 codes (en, es, ...). The launcher falls back to 'en' when the user's language is not present.

sourceRepo.description: owner/repo of the mod's own GitHub repository (used by the Pin to Release Tag flow).

approvedReleaseTag.description: Tag in sourceRepo whose contents the launcher will load. Bumping this is a Tier 2 change (auto-merge if validation passes).

type.description: IsolatedFolder = mod lives in its own folder cloned from AoE3 (e.g. WoL). InPlaceOverlay = files extracted on top of AoE3 (e.g. Improvement Mod).

defaultFolder.description: Default install path suggestion. Empty for InPlaceOverlay (resolves to AoE3's path).

probeFile.description: Relative path the launcher checks to confirm the mod is installed at a given location.

payloadUrls.description: Generic initial-install payload URLs, agnostic of the update mechanism. Used when the mod ships its files as one or more downloadable archives. For multi-part archives (e.g. .zip.001/.002/...) list every part in order; the launcher concatenates them before extracting.

payloadSha256.description: Optional but strongly recommended. Parallel array to payloadUrls — SHA-256 of each file. If present, the launcher rejects downloads whose hash doesn't match. Defends against silent payload tampering at the hosting source (e.g. account compromise, repo takeover).

mechanism.description: WolPatcher = UpdateInfo.xml + .tar.xz patches. DelegatedExternal = mod has its own external patcher; launcher only plays. GitHubReleases = updates ship as GitHub Releases on the mod's own repo.

updateInfoUrl.description: Allowed: HTTP for legacy mod servers (e.g. aoe3wol.com). The launcher logs a warning but allows it; new mods should use HTTPS.

items.description: MUST be HTTPS — the multi-part install ZIP is downloaded fresh and is the highest-risk asset.

payloadSha256.description: Optional but strongly recommended. Parallel array to payloadZipUrls — SHA-256 of each .zip. The launcher rejects downloads that don't match.

repo.description: owner/repo where community translations live (one release per translation, with a translation.json + .zip).
